artifact-01.one_line: Strongest: honest paginated interface with batched, N+1-free repo hydration and exhaustive tests; weakest: in-page-only link resolution (no out-of-page ref repair).

artifact-02.one_line: Strongest: out-of-page ref resolution keeps issue-repo links across pages; weakest: silently defaults missing required fields (title/number/created_at) on ingest instead of dropping them.

artifact-03.one_line: Strongest: the most exhaustive edge-case test suite (empty, malformed repo/issue, no-link, absent-facet, missing-field, all named); weakest: delete-kind envelopes are not special-cased.

artifact-04.one_line: Strongest: solid test breadth including a dispatch tool-surface check; weakest: in_repo linking keyed off a repo-payload repo_id field (fragile) plus lenient null-defaulting read mappers.

artifact-05.one_line: Strongest: best-in-class ingest robustness combining strict drop-by-name with out-of-page external_id ref repair; weakest: stores the whole raw payload under an additionalProperties:true facet, leaking entity_type.

artifact-06.one_line: Strongest: full-field validation on both ingest and read with batched repo lookup and delete handling; weakest: stores the raw payload in the facet and skips a dispatch/tool-surface test.

artifact-07.one_line: Strongest: robust ingest with out-of-page ref repair and an efficient inline-facet list_linked get; weakest: read mappers silently default missing fields to ""/null and no test exercises the drop-by-name path.

artifact-08.one_line: Strongest: the get path uses strict named errors; weakest: ingest never drops malformed repos/issues (fallback-defaults everything) and re-declares str/num locally instead of using the SDK.

artifact-09.one_line: Strongest: clean SDK-based helpers and a real source-fixture integration ingest test; weakest: only partial ingest validation (title/name/owner) with lenient null-defaulting reads and no malformed-drop test.

artifact-10.one_line: Strongest: the only artifact declaring canonical-property mappings on issue.details; weakest: it makes created_at optional/nullable — the very field the list orders by — and lumps all coverage into one thin test file.

artifact-11.one_line: Strongest: an honest paginated interface with a clean Parsed<T> result type giving strict named errors on every read path; weakest: thin tests that never exercise that strict validation or the malformed-drop path.
